post.description: Deletes one or more entities from a collection.

zh-CN.description: 从 Collection 中删除一个或多个 Entity。

parameters.name: Authorization
parameters.description: The authentication token should be <include target="zilliz">an API key with appropriate privileges or </include>a pair of colon-joined username and password, like `username:password`.

zh-CN.description: 认证令牌，应为<include target="zilliz">具备适当权限的 API 密钥或</include>用冒号分隔的用户名和密码，如 `username:password`。

collectionName.description: The name of the collection to which this operation applies.

oneOf.description: The ID of the entity to be deleted
An array of IDs of the entities to be deleted
The ID of the entity to be deleted
An array of IDs of the entities to be deleted

data.description: Response payload which is an empty object.

post.description: Inserts one or more entities into a collection. You can add a maximum of 100 entities at a time. To insert large volumn of data, you are advised to use the bulk-insert API. For details, refer to [Data Import](/docs/data-import).

zh-CN.description: 将一个或多个实体插入到 Collection 中。一次最多可以插入 100 个实体。若要插入大量数据，建议使用批量插入 API，具体可参考[数据导入](/docs/data-import)。

parameters.name: Authorization
parameters.description: The authentication token should be <include target="zilliz">an API key with appropriate privileges or </include>a pair of colon-joined username and password, like `username:password`.

zh-CN.description: 认证令牌，应为<include target="zilliz">具备适当权限的 API 密钥或</include>用冒号分隔的用户名和密码，如 `username:password`。

collectionName.description: The name of the collection to which entities will be inserted.

partitionName.description: The name of the partition to which this operation applies.

data.description: An entity object or an array of entity objects. Note that the keys in an entity object should match the collection schema

zh-CN.description: Entity 对象或 Entity 对象数组。注意，Entity 对象的结构应与 Collection Schema 匹配。

oneOf.description: A single entity, whose structure should match the schema of the target collection.

zh-CN.description: 单个 Entity 对象，其结构应与目标 Collection 的 Schema 一致。

items.description: A list of entities, each of which should match the schema of the target collection.

zh-CN.description: Entity 对象列表，每个对象应与目标 Collection 的 Schema 一致。

200.description: Returns the number of inserted entities and an array of their IDs.

zh-CN.description: 返回插入的 Entity 数量和 ID 数组。

data.description: Response payload which is the statistics on the insert results.

zh-CN.description: 响应负载，包含了当前插入操作的统计信息。

items.description: The ID of an inserted entity.

insertIds.description: Response payload which is an array of the IDs of inserted entities.

zh-CN.description: 插入的 Entity ID 数组。

post.description: Upserts one or more entities into a collection.

zh-CN.description: 本接口可在指定 Collection 中插入或更新一条或多条记录。

parameters.name: Authorization
parameters.description: The authentication token should be <include target="zilliz">an API key with appropriate privileges or </include>a pair of colon-joined username and password, like `username:password`.

zh-CN.description: 认证令牌。应为<include target="zilliz">具备适当权限的 API 密钥或</include>用冒号分隔的用户名和密码，如 `username:password`。

collectionName.description: The name of the collection to which entities will be upserted.

zh-CN.description: 待插入或更新记录的目标 Collection 名称。

data.description: An entity object or an array of entity objects. Note that the keys in an entity object should match the collection schema

zh-CN.description: Entity 对象或 Entity 对象数组。注意，Entity 对象的结构应与 Collection Schema 一致。

oneOf.description: A single entity, whose structure should match the schema of the target collection.

zh-CN.description: 单个 Entity 对象，其结构应与目标 Collection 的 Schema 一致。

oneOf.description: A list of entities, each of which should match the schema of the target collection.

zh-CN.description: Entity 对象列表，每个对象应与目标 Collection 的 Schema 一致。

items.description: An entity that matches the schema of the target collection.

zh-CN.description: 一个 Entity 对象，应与目标 Collection 的 Schema 一致。

200.description: Returns the number of inserted entities and an array of their IDs.

zh-CN.description: 返回已插入的实体数量和其 ID 数组。
插入或更新的 Entity 数量。

items.description: An ID of an upserted entity.

zh-CN.description: 一个插入或更新的 Entity ID。

upsertIds.description: An array of the IDs of inserted entities.

zh-CN.description: 插入或更新的 Entity ID 数组。

post.description: Conducts a similarity search on the vector field in a collection.

zh-CN.description: 本接口在指定 Collection 的向量字段上执行一次相似度搜索。

parameters.name: Authorization
parameters.description: The authentication token should be <include target="zilliz">an API key with appropriate privileges or </include>a pair of colon-joined username and password, like `username:password`.

zh-CN.description: 认证令牌。应为<include target="zilliz">具备适当权限的 API 密钥</include> 或用冒号分隔的用户名和密码对，如 `username:password`。

collectionName.description: The name of the collection to which this operation applies.

partitionNames.description: The name of the partitions to which this operation applies. Setting this parameter indicates that the search scope should be limited to the specified partitions. If not specified, the search scope is the entire collection.

zh-CN.description: Partition 名称。如果指定该参数，则只在指定 Partition 中进行搜索。如果未指定，则搜索整个 Collection。

filter.description: The filter used to find matches for the search

zh-CN.description: 搜索时使用的标量过滤条件。

limit.description:
The maximum number of entities to return.
The sum of this value of that of `offset` should be less than **16,384**.

zh-CN.description:
要求返回的最大实体数量。
`offset` 值与 `limit` 值的总和不得超过 **16,384**。

offset.description:
The number of entities to skip in the search results.
The sum of this value and that of `limit` should not be greater than **16,384**.

zh-CN.description:
要求在搜索结果中跳过的实体数量。
`offset` 值与 `limit` 值的总和不得超过 **16,384**。
随查询结果返回的字段名称。

outputFields.description: An array of fields to return along with the search results.

zh-CN.description: 要求在搜索结果中包含的字段名称列表。

items.description: A floating number representing one of the dimensions of the vector to search for.

zh-CN.description: 搜索向量的某个维度的浮点数。

vector.description: The query vector in the form of a list of floating numbers. The length of the query vector should match the dimension of the vector field in the collection.

zh-CN.description: 以浮点数列表形式表示的查询向量。该查询向量的长度应与 Collection 中向量字段的维度相同。

radius.description: The angle where the vector with the least similarity resides.

zh-CN.description: 与 `range_filter` 参数一起使用，用于指定查询向量最不相似的向量所在的角度。

range_filter.description: Used in combination to filter vector field values whose similarity to the query vector falls into a specific range.

zh-CN.description: 与 `radius` 参数一起使用，用于过滤相似度范围内的向量字段值。

data.description: Response payload that carries the search results.

items.description: Search results. By default, each entity object carries the `id` and `distance` fields. If `outputFields` is specified, the entity object also carries the specified fields.

zh-CN.description: 搜索结果。默认包含 `id` 和 `distance` 字段。如果指定了 `outputFields`，则还会包含指定的其它字段。

distance.description: The similarity score of the entity to the query vector.

zh-CN.description: 与查询向量的相似度分数。

post.description: Conducts a query on scalar fields in a collection.

zh-CN.description: 本接口在指定 Collection 中执行标量字段的查询。

parameters.name: Authorization
parameters.description: The authentication token should be <include target="zilliz">an API key with appropriate privileges or </include>a pair of colon-joined username and password, like `username:password`.

zh-CN.description: 认证令牌。应为<include target="zilliz">具备适当权限的 API 密钥或</include>用冒号分隔的用户名和密码，如 `username:password`。

collectionName.description: The name of the collection to which this operation applies.

partitionNames.description: The name of the partitions to which this operation applies.

filter.description: The filter used to find matches for the query.

limit.description:
The maximum number of entities to return.
The sum of this value and that of `offset` should be less than **16384**.

zh-CN.description:
本次查询要求返回的最大 Entity 数量。
`limit` 与 `offset` 的总和不能超过 **16384**。

offset.description:
The number of entities to skip in the search results.
The sum of this value and that of `limit` should be less than **16384**.

zh-CN.description:
本次查询结果中需要跳过的 Entity 数量。
`limit` 与 `offset` 的总和不能超过 **16384**。
随查询结果返回的字段名称。

outputFields.description: An array of fields to return along with the search results. When setting this to `count(*)`, you need to set `limit` to 0 to get the total count of the entities that match the filter.

zh-CN.description: 每条返回的查询结果中需要包含的字段名称列表。

data.description: Response payload which is an array of objects that contain the specified output fields and their corresponding values.

zh-CN.description: 响应负载，为包含了指定字段及其对应值的对象组成的数组。

items.description: Response payload which is an object that contains the specified output fields and their corresponding values.

zh-CN.description: 响应负载，为包含了指定字段及其对应值的对象。

post.description: Gets entities by the specified IDs. You can set an ID in string or integer or set a set of IDs in a list of strings or a list of integers as shown in the four types of request bodies below.

zh-CN.description: 本接口可按指定 ID 返回 Entity。你可以使用四种请求体中的一种来指定 ID。

parameters.name: Authorization
parameters.description: The authentication token should be <include target="zilliz">an API key with appropriate privileges or </include>a pair of colon-joined username and password, like `username:password`.

zh-CN.description: 认证令牌。应为<include target="zilliz">具备适当权限的 API 密钥或</include>用冒号分隔的用户名和密码，如 `username:password`。

collectionName.description: The name of the collection to which this operation applies.

partitionNames.description: The name of the partitions to which this operation applies. Setting this indicates that the operation should be applied to only these partitions. If not set, the operation will be applied to all partitions in the collection.

zh-CN.description: Partition 名称列表。设置后，当前操作只会应用到这些分区。如果不设置，当前操作会应用到 Collection 中的所有分区。

outputFields.description: An array of fields to return along with the query results.

zh-CN.description: 查询结果中要返回的字段列表。

oneOf.description: The ID of the entity to be retrieved
An array of IDs of the entities to be retrieved

zh-CN.description: 需要获取的 Entity ID 列表。

oneOf.description: The ID of entity to be retrieved
An array of IDs of the entities to be retrieved

zh-CN.description: 需要获取的 Entity ID 列表。
返回的一个 Entity 对象。
